hero.description: A warm community where worship feels like family, faith grows with purpose, and every visitor is invited to discover a place to belong.

coreValues.description: Our vision and mission guide us to share God's love, live by His Word, and serve others as part of Christ's redemptive work.

pillars.title: Vision
pillars.description: Sharing God's love and salvation through Jesus Christ, and taking part in His redemptive work in the world.

pillars.title: Mission
pillars.description: Following God's words and teachings in the Bible, and living our faith in practical ways that reflect His love and grace.
pillars.footer: Love God, and love others as ourselves.

coreBeliefs.description: These core doctrines summarize the hope, calling, and foundation of faith we hold as part of the Seventh-day Adventist Church.
coreBeliefs.readMore: Read more about the 28 Adventist Beliefs

items.title: Sabbath
items.summary: A holy day to pause, worship, and enjoy fellowship with God and one another.

items.title: Second Coming of Jesus
items.summary: The church's great hope that Christ will return visibly and gloriously.

items.title: The Bible
items.summary: God's Word is the foundation of faith, teaching, and the life of every believer.

items.title: Baptism
items.summary: A sign of commitment to Christ, repentance, and new life in Him.

items.title: Stewardship
items.summary: Everything we have comes from God and is used faithfully for His glory.

items.title: The Remnant and Its Mission
items.summary: God's people are called to be faithful, share salvation, and live as His witnesses.

rundown.momentsTitle: What does our Sabbath worship look like?

items.title: Sabbath School
items.detail: Sabbath School discussions to start the Sabbath on a spiritual note.
items.subdetail: In Sabbath School worship, we start off with a few songs. Welcome and opening prayer are led by the Sabbath School leader. We have a special song, followed by a mission story, offering, lesson discussion, and a closing family worship or stewardship moment.

items.title: Divine Service
items.detail: Praise, prayer, and the main sermon for the day.
items.subdetail: In Divine Service, the congregation gathers to praise God, pray together, read Scripture, and listen to a message that strengthens faith.

items.title: Potluck Fellowship
items.detail: A shared meal and warm conversations with the church family.
items.subdetail: Potluck fellowship is a time to get to know one another, welcome guests, and enjoy community after worship.

items.title: Choir Practice
items.detail: Song rehearsal and preparation for upcoming worship services.
items.subdetail: The choir rehearses vocals, harmonies, and ministry songs so they can serve with readiness and heart.

items.title: Adventist Youth Fellowship
items.detail: Youth-led worship, activities, and spiritual reflection.
items.subdetail: Youth fellowship closes the Sabbath with praise, Bible reflection, group activities, and a time of prayerful commitment together.

moments.label: Moment 01
moments.title: A soft start before worship begins
moments.description: Temporary image placeholder for the welcome moments, greetings, and early arrivals before the service starts.

moments.label: Moment 02
moments.title: Voices rising together in praise
moments.description: This is standing in for future worship photos and helps the section feel alive while the real gallery is being prepared.

moments.label: Moment 03
moments.title: Scripture, stillness, and reflection
moments.description: A placeholder frame for the quieter parts of the day, where the room settles and attention turns toward the message.

moments.label: Moment 04
moments.title: Shared meals and joyful conversations
moments.description: This will eventually be swapped for fellowship photography, but for now it keeps the story of the day flowing visually.

moments.label: Moment 05
moments.title: Ending the Sabbath with warmth
moments.description: A final placeholder image for the closing rhythm of the day, leaving the section with a calm and gracious finish.

location.description: We warmly welcome you to visit us in person. Below, you'll find our church location and worship hours. We look forward to seeing you and sharing in fellowship together.

contact.description: Feel free to reach out to us through any of the methods. Whether you want to send prayer requests, questions, or a simple greeting, we're here to listen and connect with you.

items.title: What time does Sabbath worship begin?
items.content: Sabbath School begins at 8:30 AM and Divine Service begins around 10:30 AM every Saturday.

items.title: Are visitors welcome to worship with us?
items.content: Absolutely. We welcome every guest who wants to worship, study Scripture, or join our fellowship.

items.title: What language is used during worship?
items.content: The main worship service is usually in Bahasa Indonesia, with welcome and support for English-speaking guests when needed.

items.title: Are there activities for young people?
items.content: Yes. Adventist Youth Fellowship is usually held on Saturday afternoon with praise, Bible discussion, and group activities.

items.title: How can I contact the church?
items.content: You can contact us through Gmail, WhatsApp, or the social media links listed in the Get in Touch section.

footer.description: GMAHK Villa Nusa Indah Seventh-day Adventist Church is a church community committed to sharing the love of Christ and serving the community with dedication.
footer.address: Jl. Raya Villa Nusa Indah, Villa Nusa Indah District
footer.built: Built with love by the VNI Coms Team.
